The '''FLTCH-series battle droid''' of mercenary combat [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were produced prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by the [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]] for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Characteristics==
They were often used as assassins and were equipped with built-in blaster, explosive projectiles, and blades and spikes for close combat. The droids were 2.3 meters tall. They were designed for security and military duties, and were known to be determined and effective fighters. One drawback of the design was the hands, which required the droid to use specially designed weapons. It was also limited due to its large size, which could hinder its ability to move or use small objects.<ref name="SGD" />

==History==
One droid, [[FLTCH R-1]] was dispatched by [[Junior Representative/Legends|Representative]] [[Bron (Human)|Bron]] and [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] to assassinate [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. Ki-Adi-Mundi defeated the droid and had it reprogrammed to work for him in hunting down Mon.

[[Firkrann (Jedi)|Firkrann]], a member of the [[Iron Knight]]s, an offshoot of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] made of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Shard (species)|Shard]]<nowiki/>s, used a FLTCH series droid as a body.
